title: Python Gave Me a Wrong Answer With No Error
description:
Summed a column of ages. Got '283542'. No error — they were strings.

Types matter before anything else in data work. Full Tutorial 2 in link. #Shorts #Python #DataScience #LearnPython
hook_visual: Screen recording: Python terminal running sum() on a list of string ages — output shows '283542' with a red X overlay and text: 'No error. Wrong answer.' Cut within 2 seconds.
end_screen_cta: Subscribe for the full 10-tutorial Python series — drop a question below if this happened to you.
